---
name: Feature Request
about: request a new feature or suggest improvements to existing ones
title: '[FEATURE Request] - New feature'
labels: enhancement, needs-triage
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature description
A clear and concise description of what the feature would do.
 $as in why it would be valuable and how it would benefit users.
$as in some examples or use cases.
## ✅ Examples
- Interactive data visualizations
- Real-time data integration
- Custom filters and facets
- Export functionality (CSV, JSON, XML)
- Mobile app (PWA)
- Offline support
- Accessibility improvements (ARabic/RTL, keyboard navigation, theme switcher)

- Dark mode toggle

- Search with autocomplete
- Location-based recommendations

- Data caching
- Sitemap
- i18n routing

- Any improvements to performance
- accessibility compliance

- SEO optimization
- analytics integration
- error tracking

- better documentation
- Internationalization improvements
- Support for Serbian (Cyrillic), Serbian (Latin), and English

## 💡 Use Cases
Provide specific examples of how these features would enhance the platform.
## 🎯 Goals
- Improve user experience with open data
- Increase platform adoption
- Make the easier for developers to integrate new technologies
- maintain code quality
- ensure proper documentation
## 📋 Checklist
- [ ] I have checked if the features are mobile-friendly
- [ ] I have tested on multiple devices
- [ ] I have added documentation for new features
- [ ] I have verified that the feature works on mobile devices
- [ ] Responsive design has been tested
- [ ] Accessibility has been verified
- [ ] I have added translations for all supported languages
- [ ] I have considered the performance improvements might
- [ ] I have considered adding unit tests
- [ ] I have considered integration tests
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline has been configured appropriately
- [ ] I have read the [Contributing guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have checked that my code follows the [code style](CODestyle)
    guide or project structure
    [ ] My changes are ready to be reviewed
- [ ] I have updated the relevant documentation
